pending_branches.description: test+refactor: 17 new contract tests (getSystemMessageLabel + extractCustomTitleFromText) and getProjectBaseName helper extraction (79->96 tests)

notes: npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities. Tests: 79 on main; pending branch adds 17 more to 96. Branch kanbanbot/test-system-messages-custom-title-20260412 has 2 commits: (1) 17 new tests covering getSystemMessageLabel (12 cases incl. dedup) and extractCustomTitleFromText (5 cases); (2) refactor extracting getProjectBaseName to UTILS region, replacing 8 call sites including fixing 2 inconsistent split('/') uses. Safe-output MCP tools unavailable for THIRD consecutive run. Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates still need issue discussion. CDN dep pinning is future work. All 6 open KanbanBot PRs (#31, #32, #33, #35, #36, #37) remain open.
